title: knesebeckia acutiloba
intro: Knesebeckia acutiloba, also known as Chinese knesebeckia or cut-leaved knesebeckia, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Knesebeckia acutiloba include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and treating respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Knesebeckia acutiloba can be found in tea, tincture, and extract form, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
